zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Borlase於大約1512年出生時，她的父親Walter Borlase31歲，母親Philippa Treluddra29歲。她於大約1534年與Henry Bray在英國可瓦爾武內結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1556年4月21日在英國英格蘭可瓦爾武內享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Borlase于大约1512年出生时，她的父亲Walter Borlase31岁，母亲Philippa Treluddra29岁。她于大约1534年与Henry Bray在英国可瓦爾武內结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1556年4月21日在英国英格兰可瓦爾武內享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Borlase
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: Norman, English, Scottish: locative name from Old French bordelais ‘man from Bordeaux’.

variants.name: Barlas
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Sajid, Ali, Humaira, Mohammed, Rehan.  Greek Dimitrios, Spiro, Spiros.

Scottish (Perthshire): habitational name, probably from Barloch, near Milngavie (Stirlings) + post-medieval excrescent -s. The final syllable of Barloch will alternatively have been pronounced -low and -lie in Scots, whence a variety of attested surname forms including Barlow, Barlows, Barlie, Barliss, Barles(s), and Barlas(s), mostly clustering in settlements near Blackruthven in Tibbermore parish (Perthshire), where the surname Barloche is first recorded in 1589.
Greek: probably a nickname derived from parla ‘blabbering’ (from Italian parlare ‘to talk’). Alternatively, perhaps a nickname derived from Aromanian bărliv ‘tormented, long-suffering’.

variants.name: Burles
meanings: 1 English: variant of Burle with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Borlase was born about 1512, her father, Walter Borlase, was 31 and her mother, Philippa Treluddra, was 29. She married Henry Bray about 1534, in Camborne, Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 April 1556, in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Borlase est née environ 1512, son père, Walter Borlase, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Philippa Treluddra, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Henry Bray environ 1534, à Camborne, Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 avril 1556, à Camborne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Borlase um 1512 geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Borlase 31 und ihre Mutter Philippa Treluddra 29. Sie hat um 1534 in Camborne, Cornwall, England Henry Bray geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. April 1556 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Camborne, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Borlase è nata il circa 1512, sua padre, Walter Borlase, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Philippa Treluddra, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Henry Bray circa 1534, nel Camborne, Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 aprile 1556, nel Camborne, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Borlaseが約1512年に生まれた時，父Walter Borlaseは31歳，母Philippa Treluddraは29歳であった。約1534年にイギリスコルンワルカンボルンでHenry Brayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1556年4月21日にイギリスイギリスコルンワルカンボルンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Borlase(이)가 대략 1512년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Borlase(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Philippa Treluddra(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 대략 1534년 영국 코른월 캄본에서 Henry Bray(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1556년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 캄본에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Borlase nasceu aproximadamente 1512, seu pai, Walter Borlase, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Treluddra, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Henry Bray aproximadamente 1534, em Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de abril de 1556, em Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Borlase родилась около 1512 г., её отцу по имени Walter Borlase было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Philippa Treluddra, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Henry Bray около 1534 г. в местности камборн, корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 апреля 1556 г. в местности камборн, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Borlase nació aproximadamente 1512, su papá, Walter Borlase, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Philippa Treluddra, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Henry Bray aproximadamente 1534, en Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de abril de 1556, en Camborne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 45 años.
